rule_text: Specialisation-based registration for AP Special Class and Class-I contractors is DISPENSED with — these contractors are eligible for ALL categories of works unless tender process specifies a particular specialisation requirement.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VIII (R&B Modified Rules) Section 1
verification_method: Special Class and Class-I bidders are eligible across categories; reject only if tender QR specifies specialisation requirement

rule_text: AP Commissioner of Tenders (COT) maintains a centralised contractor-experience website; existing contractors must submit experience details with affidavit within 3 months; COT publishes details, accepts objections within 1 month, finalises within 1 month after objections; false-information submissions are liable to blacklisting; false objections are penalised up to Rs.10,000.
verification_method: Verification of bidder experience must use COT-maintained website data, not third-party agencies; reject manual external verification

rule_text: AP Commissioner of Tenders issues Pass Books to each registered contractor recording experience, financial capacity, awards, cancellations; bidders must enclose Pass Book Xerox copy with tender applications; entries must be made by EE-rank+ officer; Pass Book details must tally with COT website.
verification_method: Check tender bid file contains contractor's COT-issued Pass Book copy; cross-reference Pass Book entries with COT website at evaluation

rule_text: Duplicate Pass Book issuance fees: Rs.5,000 first occasion; Rs.25,000 each subsequent occasion — to discourage repeat losses.
verification_method: If duplicate Pass Book in use, check the relevant fee was paid; documentary requirement only

rule_text: Two-stage EMD collection (1% at tender-document issue + 1.5% at agreement, total 2.5%) under GO 94/2003 applies EVEN IN E-PROCUREMENT — confirming that e-procurement does not waive the AP-state EMD-collection mechanism.
verification_method: Check e-procurement tenders also implement two-stage EMD via apeprocurement.gov.in payment gateway; reject single-EMD e-tenders
